{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Valinhall entry hall
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Valinhall entry hall]] contains red-cushioned furniture, lights, mirrors, and [[sword]] racks.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Valinhall Gate]] unfolds into a vision of the [[Valinhall]] entry room.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
